# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: c:/Work/AdventOfCode
# It was generated by CMake: C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Professional/VC/Tools/MSVC/14.38.33130/bin/Hostx64/x64/lib.exe

//Semicolon separated list of supported configuration types, only
// supports Debug, Release, MinSizeRel, and RelWithDebInfo, anything
// else will be ignored.
CMAKE_CONFIGURATION_TYPES:STRING=Debug;Release;MinSizeRel;RelWithDebInfo

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=/DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS /W3 /GR /EHsc

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=/MDd /Zi /Ob0 /Od /RTC1

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=/MD /O1 /Ob1 /DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=/MD /O2 /Ob2 /DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=/MD /Zi /O2 /Ob1 /DNDEBUG

//Libraries linked by default with all C++ applications.
CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=kernel32.lib user32.lib gdi32.lib winspool.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib uuid.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=/DWIN32 /D_WINDOWS /W3

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=/MDd /Zi /Ob0 /Od /RTC1

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=/MD /O1 /Ob1 /DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=/MD /O2 /Ob2 /DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=/MD /Zi /O2 /Ob1 /DNDEBUG

//Libraries linked by default with all C applications.
CMAKE_C_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=kernel32.lib user32.lib gdi32.lib winspool.lib shell32.lib ole32.lib oleaut32.lib uuid.lib comdlg32.lib advapi32.lib

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=/machine:x64

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=/debug /INCREMENTAL

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=/INCREMENTAL:NO

CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=/debug /INCREMENTAL

CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Don't create a package lock file in the binary path
CPM_DONT_CREATE_PACKAGE_LOCK:BOOL=OFF

//Don't update the module path to allow using find_package
CPM_DONT_UPDATE_MODULE_PATH:BOOL=OFF

//Always download dependencies from source
CPM_DOWNLOAD_ALL:BOOL=OFF

CPM_INCLUDE_ALL_IN_PACKAGE_LOCK:BOOL=OFF

//Only use `find_package` to get dependencies
CPM_LOCAL_PACKAGES_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

CPM_SOURCE_CACHE:PATH=OFF

//Always try to use `find_package` to get dependencies
CPM_USE_LOCAL_PACKAGES:BOOL=OFF

CPM_USE_NAMED_CACHE_DIRECTORIES:BOOL=OFF

//Force download capstone
DOWNLOAD_CAPSTONE:BOOL=ON

//Force download freetype
DOWNLOAD_FREETYPE:BOOL=OFF

//Force download glfw
DOWNLOAD_GLFW:BOOL=OFF

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=C:/Work/AdventOfCode/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for capstone
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_CAPSTONE:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for freetype
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_FREETYPE:PATH=

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for glfw
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_GLFW:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of capstone
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_CAPSTONE:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of freetype
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_FREETYPE:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of glfw
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_GLFW:BOOL=OFF

//Disable support of compressed WOFF2 fonts.
FT_DISABLE_BROTLI:BOOL=OFF

//Disable support of bzip2 compressed fonts.
FT_DISABLE_BZIP2:BOOL=OFF

//Disable support of PNG compressed OpenType embedded bitmaps.
FT_DISABLE_PNG:BOOL=OFF

//Disable use of system zlib and use internal zlib library instead.
FT_DISABLE_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Enable support for meaningful error descriptions.
FT_ENABLE_ERROR_STRINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Require support of compressed WOFF2 fonts.
FT_REQUIRE_BROTLI:BOOL=OFF

//Require support of bzip2 compressed fonts.
FT_REQUIRE_BZIP2:BOOL=OFF

//Require support of PNG compressed OpenType embedded bitmaps.
FT_REQUIRE_PNG:BOOL=OFF

//Require system zlib instead of internal zlib library.
FT_REQUIRE_ZLIB:BOOL=OFF

//Build Cauldron with DX12
GFX_API_DX12:BOOL=ON

//Build Cauldron with Vulkan
GFX_API_VK:BOOL=ON

GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=C:/Program Files/Git/cmd/git.exe

//Build support for Win32

//Value Computed by CMake
GLFW_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

GLFW_LIBRARY_TYPE:STRING=

GLFW_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/Work/AdventOfCode/_deps/glfw-src

GLFW_USE_HYBRID_HPG:BOOL=OFF

//Use the GTK file selector on Linux instead of the xdg-portal
// one
GTK_FILESELECTOR:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
ImGUI_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/Work/AdventOfCode/AoC_DX12_V/libs/cauldron/libs/imgui

ImGUI_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
ImGUI_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/Work/AdventOfCode/AoC_DX12_V/libs/cauldron/libs/imgui

//Instead of Wayland, use the legacy X11 backend on Linux
LEGACY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable the file selector
NO_FILESELECTOR:BOOL=OFF

//Disable ISA extensions (don't pass -march=native or -mcpu=native
// to the compiler)
NO_ISA_EXTENSIONS:BOOL=OFF

//Disable parallel STL
NO_PARALLEL_STL:BOOL=OFF

//Disable calculation of statistics
NO_STATISTICS:BOOL=OFF

//Arguments to supply to pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN:STRING=

//pkg-config executable
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE-NOTFOUND

//Enable self-profiling
SELF_PROFILE:BOOL=OFF

//Enforce callstack collection for tracy regions
TRACY_CALLSTACK:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy python client library
TRACY_CLIENT_PYTHON:BOOL=OFF

//Enable delayed initialization of the library (init on first call)
TRACY_DELAYED_INIT:BOOL=OFF

//[advanced] Don't use default demangling function - You'll need
// to provide your own
TRACY_DEMANGLE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable profiling
TRACY_ENABLE:BOOL=ON

//Enable fibers support
TRACY_FIBERS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable libbacktrace to support dynamically loaded elfs in symbol
// resolution resolution after the first symbol resolve operation
TRACY_LIBBACKTRACE_ELF_DYNLOAD_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//Use libunwind backtracing where supported
TRACY_LIBUNWIND_BACKTRACE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable the manual lifetime management of the profile
TRACY_MANUAL_LIFETIME:BOOL=OFF

//Disable client discovery by broadcast to local network
TRACY_NO_BROADCAST:BOOL=OFF

//Disable all callstack related functionality
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK:BOOL=OFF

//Disables the inline functions in callstacks
TRACY_NO_CALLSTACK_INLINES:BOOL=OFF

//Disable collection of source code
TRACY_NO_CODE_TRANSFER:BOOL=OFF

//Disable capture of context switches
TRACY_NO_CONTEXT_SWITCH:BOOL=OFF

//Disable crash handling
TRACY_NO_CRASH_HANDLER:BOOL=OFF

//Client executable does not exit until all profile data is sent
// to server
TRACY_NO_EXIT:BOOL=OFF

//Disable the frame image support and its thread
TRACY_NO_FRAME_IMAGE:BOOL=OFF

//Disable call stack sampling
TRACY_NO_SAMPLING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable systrace sampling
TRACY_NO_SYSTEM_TRACING:BOOL=OFF

//Disable zone validation for C API
TRACY_NO_VERIFY:BOOL=OFF

//Disable capture of hardware Vsync events
TRACY_NO_VSYNC_CAPTURE:BOOL=OFF

//Tracy will only accept connections on IPv4 addresses (disable
// IPv6)
TRACY_ONLY_IPV4:BOOL=OFF

//Only listen on the localhost interface
TRACY_ONLY_LOCALHOST:BOOL=OFF

//On-demand profiling
TRACY_ON_DEMAND:BOOL=OFF

//Enable nopsleds for efficient patching by system-level tools
// (e.g. rr)
TRACY_PATCHABLE_NOPSLEDS:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to build Tracy as a static library
TRACY_STATIC:BOOL=ON

//Instead of full runtime symbol resolution, only resolve the image
// path and offset to enable offline symbol resolution
TRACY_SYMBOL_OFFLINE_RESOLVE:BOOL=OFF

//Use lower resolution timers
TRACY_TIMER_FALLBACK:BOOL=OFF

//[advanced] Verbose output from the profiler
TRACY_VERBOSE:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=C:/Work/AdventOfCode/Tools/tracy

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tracy_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=C:/Work/AdventOfCode/Tools/tracy

USE_MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY_DLL:BOOL=ON

CMAKE_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created
CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=c:/Work/AdventOfCode
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=31
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=3

CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cmake.exe
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/cpack.exe
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=C:/Program Files/CMake/bin/ctest.exe

CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
